title: Are AI Glasses Over? + Big Technology AI Summit Audience Questions
summary: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy from Margins discuss the state of AR glasses with Snapchat Specs as a signal, explore what AI devices should do and ideal form factors, and debate responsibility and U.S.-China cooperation in AI. The podcast covers technology planning and potential applications in biology.
writeup: Alex Kantrowitz and Ranjan Roy of Margins assess the current state of AR glasses, using Snapchat Specs as a signal for where the category stands. The conversation extends to what AI devices should actually do, what an ideal form factor looks like, and questions of responsibility and U.S.-China cooperation in AI. The episode also touches on technology planning and potential applications in biology, drawing on audience questions from the Big Technology AI Summit.
